div.span: I asked AI and got my confusion cleared, currently in localhost it is just one server that is running as replicatset with replicaset protocols, if want to add the the different nodes as replicaset, then first we have to start the multiple mongodb server at different ports and then we will have to explicitly add to server as replicaset in the primary node use rs.add() command
